title: Personnel Department - Recruitment Announcements of Administrative Personnel
content:
Personnel Department - Recruitment Announcements of Administrative Personnel

Principles of Istanbul Esenyurt University selection and placement system;

In the competencies required,

Will be able to adopt and implement the vision, mission and principles of our university,

He will develop himself, his team and his institution,

To follow and apply the developments in technology,

To employ educated and professional human resources.

Being Versatile and Open to Innovation

Click here for the administrative personnel application form.

Click here for administrative staff job postings.
